code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let t = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut j = 0
  while j < nums.len()
    let cur = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if j == 0
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    else
      let prev = match nums.get(j - 1)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if cur != prev
        result = list.push(result, cur)
      end
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < result.len()
    let v = match result.get(k)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  print(out)
  Ok(())
end
